text:
(a) In addition to any requirement established by department rule, a motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer must have an identification number inspection under Section 501.0321 (Identification Number Inspection) if:

(1) the department does not have a motor vehicle record for the motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer in the department’s registration and title system, and the owner of the motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer is filing a bond with the department under Section 501.053 (Filing of Bond as Alternative to Hearing) ;

(2) the motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer was last titled or registered outside of the United States and imported into the United States; or

(3) the owner or person claiming ownership requires an assigned or reassigned identification number under Section 501.033 (Assignment and Reassignment of Identification Number by Department) .

(b) An active duty member of a branch of the United States armed forces, or an immediate family member of such a member, returning to Texas with acceptable proof of the active duty status is exempt from an identification number inspection required under Subsection (a)(2).

(c) Repealed by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 969 (S.B. 2076 ), Sec. 26(1), eff. September 1, 2017.

(d) Repealed by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 969 (S.B. 2076 ), Sec. 26(1), eff. September 1, 2017.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.032 — Identification Number Inspection Required

(a) In addition to any requirement established by department rule, a motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer must have an identification number inspection under Section 501.0321 (Identification Number Inspection) if:

    (1) the department does not have a motor vehicle record for the motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer in the department’s registration and title system, and the owner of the motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer is filing a bond with the department under Section 501.053 (Filing of Bond as Alternative to Hearing) ;

    (2) the motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer was last titled or registered outside of the United States and imported into the United States; or

    (3) the owner or person claiming ownership requires an assigned or reassigned identification number under Section 501.033 (Assignment and Reassignment of Identification Number by Department) .

(b) An active duty member of a branch of the United States armed forces, or an immediate family member of such a member, returning to Texas with acceptable proof of the active duty status is exempt from an identification number inspection required under Subsection (a)(2).

(c) Repealed by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 969 (S.B. 2076 ), Sec. 26(1), eff. September 1, 2017.

(d) Repealed by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 969 (S.B. 2076 ), Sec. 26(1), eff. September 1, 2017.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 969 (S.B.2076), Sec. 26(1), eff. September 1, 2017.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: In addition to any requirement established by department rule, a motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer must have an identification number inspection under Section 501.0321 (Identification Number Inspection) if:

the department does not have a motor vehicle record for the motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer in the department’s registration and title system, and the owner of the motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer is filing a bond with the department under Section 501.053 (Filing of Bond as Alternative to Hearing) ;
the motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer was last titled or registered outside of the United States and imported into the United States; or
the owner or person claiming ownership requires an assigned or reassigned identification number under Section 501.033 (Assignment and Reassignment of Identification Number by Department) .

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An active duty member of a branch of the United States armed forces, or an immediate family member of such a member, returning to Texas with acceptable proof of the active duty status is exempt from an identification number inspection required under Subsection (a)(2).

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: Repealed by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 969 (S.B. 2076 ), Sec. 26(1), eff. September 1, 2017.

subsections.label: d
subsections.text: Repealed by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 969 (S.B. 2076 ), Sec. 26(1), eff. September 1, 2017.
